mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (reservation_no, schedule_id, member_id, total_amount, seat_count, status) VALUES (#{reservationNo}, #{scheduleId}, #{memberId}, #{totalAmount}, #{seatCount}, 'PENDING')
INSERT INTO reservation_seat (reservation_id, seat_id, price) VALUES (#{s.reservationId}, #{s.seatId}, #{s.price})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, r.status AS rsv_status, p.title AS performance_title, p.venue_name AS venue, m.name AS member_name, m.email AS member_email, m.phone AS member_phone, sc.show_date, sc.show_time, pay.status AS payment_status, pay.method AS payment_method, el.checked_in_at, rs.seat_id AS rs_seat_id, rs.price AS rs_price, s.section AS rs_section, s.seat_row AS rs_seat_row, s.seat_number AS rs_seat_number, s.grade AS rs_grade FROM reservation r JOIN schedule sc ON r.schedule_id=sc.schedule_id JOIN performance p ON sc.performance_id=p.performance_id JOIN member m ON r.member_id=m.member_id LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.reservation_id=r.reservation_id LEFT JOIN entrance_log el ON el.reservation_id=r.reservation_id LEFT JOIN reservation_seat rs ON r.reservation_id=rs.reservation_id LEFT JOIN seat s ON rs.seat_id=s.seat_id WHERE r.reservation_id=#{reservationId}

SELECT r.*, r.status AS rsv_status, p.title AS performance_title, p.venue_name AS venue, m.name AS member_name, m.email AS member_email, m.phone AS member_phone, sc.show_date, sc.show_time, pay.status AS payment_status, pay.method AS payment_method, el.checked_in_at, rs.seat_id AS rs_seat_id, rs.price AS rs_price, s.section AS rs_section, s.seat_row AS rs_seat_row, s.seat_number AS rs_seat_number, s.grade AS rs_grade FROM reservation r JOIN schedule sc ON r.schedule_id=sc.schedule_id JOIN performance p ON sc.performance_id=p.performance_id JOIN member m ON r.member_id=m.member_id LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.reservation_id=r.reservation_id LEFT JOIN entrance_log el ON el.reservation_id=r.reservation_id LEFT JOIN reservation_seat rs ON r.reservation_id=rs.reservation_id LEFT JOIN seat s ON rs.seat_id=s.seat_id WHERE r.reservation_no=#{reservationNo}

SELECT r.*, p.title AS performance_title, p.venue_name AS venue, sc.show_date, sc.show_time FROM reservation r JOIN schedule sc ON r.schedule_id=sc.schedule_id JOIN performance p ON sc.performance_id=p.performance_id WHERE r.member_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status='CONFIRMED', confirmed_at=NOW() WHERE reservation_id=#{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE status = 'CONFIRMED' AND DATE(COALESCE(confirmed_at, created_at)) = CURDATE()

SELECT r.*, p.title AS performance_title, p.venue_name AS venue, sc.show_date, sc.show_time FROM reservation r JOIN schedule sc ON r.schedule_id = sc.schedule_id JOIN performance p ON sc.performance_id = p.performance_id WHERE r.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
